title: elaphoglossum bahiense
intro: Elaphoglossum bahiense is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Brazil. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum bahiense is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
